headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，多部大片蓄势待发
summary: 2026年7月3日，娱乐焦点集中在《痴迷》的持续热度上，同时《福尔摩斯小姐3》与《穿普拉达的女王2》等新片引发热议，本周共三部新片上映，市场期待值攀升。

industryHighlights.text: 今日无新片上映，市场进入暑期档预热期
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, market warming up for summer season

industryHighlights.text: 《痴迷》连续多日霸榜，话题度居高不下
industryHighlights.en: 'Obsession' dominates charts for multiple days with high buzz

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》本周热度不减，经典IP持续吸粉
industryHighlights.en: 'Toy Story 5' remains hot this week, classic IP attracts fans

industryHighlights.text: 流媒体平台加大原创内容投入，竞争白热化
industryHighlights.en: Streaming platforms ramp up original content investment, competition intensifies

industryHighlights.text: 粉丝期待《超级少女》新预告片即将发布
industryHighlights.en: Fans anticipate new trailer for 'Supergirl' coming soon
